metadata.description: Parallax — a spec-driven, blind-coder TDD pipeline for Claude Code with an optional cross-model verifier and human-gated safe completion.

plugins.name: parallax
plugins.description: Parallax — independent paths, one verified result. Claude Code provides the slash-command pipeline; Codex provides a skills-only adapter for the same fail-closed workflow. Claude slash commands are not exposed as Codex commands.
